name: Cadence Design Systems
analysis: CDNS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $387.3900, stop $369.8046, target $440.1462 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
